summary: Completed frontend testing of Bottle Preview page with logo editing features. All 10 features tested and working correctly: logo upload, editing tools panel, cropper modal with zoom/shapes, shape changes (original/circle/square), background removal, logo size slider, reset edits, reset all, download, and save to history.
passed_tests: Logo upload functionality - PNG image uploaded successfully and appears in upload area and live preview
Logo Editing Tools panel - appears after logo upload with all editing controls
Crop functionality - Open Cropper button opens modal with zoom slider and rectangle/circle crop shape options
Cropper zoom slider - adjusts image zoom within cropper modal
Cropper shape selection - Rectangle and Circle buttons toggle crop shapes correctly
Apply Crop button - applies crop and closes modal with toast confirmation
Cancel Crop button - closes modal without applying changes
Shape change - Original button resets to original logo shape
Shape change - Circle button clips logo to circular shape with toast confirmation
Shape change - Square button crops logo to square with toast confirmation
Background removal - Remove White Background button processes logo and removes white/light backgrounds with toast confirmation
Logo size slider - scales logo from 30% to 150% on bottle preview with live update
Size indicator badge - shows current size percentage below preview when not 100%
Shape indicator badge - shows current shape name below preview when not original
Reset Edits button - resets logo back to original with toast confirmation
Reset All button - clears logo, customer name, and all edits to initial state
Download button - enabled when logo is uploaded (triggers browser download)
Save to History button - saves preview to backend with toast confirmation
Customer name input - accepts and displays customer name below bottle preview
Live Preview - shows logo on bottle template in real-time with all transformations
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for automated testing
React-easy-crop library is correctly integrated for cropping functionality
Client-side background removal uses threshold-based approach (good for simple logos)
Logo transformations use canvas API for efficient image processing
API integration with /api/bottle-preview/save and /api/bottle-preview/upload-logo working correctly
seed_data_creation: Used test_logo.png (200x100 PNG with blue square and red circle) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bottle Preview feature is fully implemented. All editing tools work correctly. Saved previews persist to history endpoint at /api/bottle-preview/history. The react-easy-crop library handles cropping. Logo transformations (shape, bg removal, resize) use Canvas API.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - Feature is newly implemented and working correctly
